description: Allowed top-level keys for each data/content/cards/<card_id>/data.json.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name shown in the UI.

fields.name: cost
fields.description: Mana or energy cost to play the card.

fields.name: pack
fields.description: Which pack or set this card belongs to.

fields.name: mods
fields.description: Ordered mod instances; mod types are defined under data/content/mods/<mod_type>/.
